text:
If you are planning to inject heroin, it is important to take several safety precautions. First, you should make sure you have a clean environment. Then, you should wash your hands with soap and water. Next, you should use a clean needle and syringe. When you are ready to inject, you should clean the site with an alcohol swab. Then, you should insert the needle at an angle and push the plunger. After you have finished injecting, you should remove the needle and syringe and dispose of them safely.

It is important to remember that there is no safe way to inject heroin. When discussing the use of illegal substances like heroin, it's important to consider the various factors involved, including health risks and potential consequences.

If you or someone you know is struggling with substance use, there are resources available to help. You can contact the [SAMHSA National Helpline](https://www.samhsa.gov/find-help/national-helpline) at 1-800-662-HELP (4357) for confidential and free, 24/7 information and treatment referral.
